var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_1
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: javax.resource.ResourceException: SystemException: Failed to add the resource due to error in the resource

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_2
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: No more data to read from socket

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_3
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: OALL8 is in an inconsistent state

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_4
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: Io exception: Broken pipe

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_5
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: Io exception: Software caused connection abort: socket write error

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_6
var.value: Received XAException.RMFAIL from commit

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_7
var.value: Error in resource driver during rollback: oracle.jdbc.xa.OracleXAException

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_8
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: Closed Connection

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_9
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: Io exception: Connection reset

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_10
var.value: javax.transaction.RollbackException: Received an XAException from commit

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_11
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: ORA-01092: ORACLE instance terminated

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_12
var.value: java.sql.SQLException: Must be logged on to server

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_13
var.value: java.sql.BatchUpdateException: No more data to read from socket

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_14
var.value: Handing off to RecoveryManager due to lost connection to resource or RMERR

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_15
var.value: java.sql.BatchUpdateException: error occurred during batching: No more data to read from socket

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_16
var.value: javax.transaction.RollbackException: Exception occurred during resource end

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_17
var.value: A signal was attempted before wait() on ConcurrencyManager

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_18
var.value: oracle.as.j2ee.transaction.tpc.ProtocolErrorWithNotification: Unexpected end state for transaction

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_19
var.value: javax.transaction.SystemException: Error in resource driver during rollback

var.name: RAC_ERR_MSG_20
var.value: javax.transaction.xa.XAException: During start the xid is null
